title: Bar Charts for Category Comparisons in Datilio
summary: Bar charts are Datilio's fastest path from upload to 'who contributed most?'

content.summary: Bar charts are Datilio's fastest path from upload to 'who contributed most?'

body.text: Category comparisons anchor weekly standups and regional reviews. Pick category dimension and numeric measure. Sort descending. Filter long tails via rules when SKU count explodes.

body.alt: Professional reviewing business charts on a laptop
body.caption: Professional reviewing business charts on a laptop. Photo: Unsplash

body.text: Pick category dimension and numeric measure. Sort descending. Filter long tails via rules when SKU count explodes.
Cross-check bar totals with filtered sums before sharing.

items: Watch for null categories as blank bars.
Save filter context with the chart view.

body.text: Same bar configuration on fresh upload with saved rules—no rebuild from scratch.
Pair with Talk to Data to confirm top-N rankings verbally and visually.
Datilio bar charts are the workhorse of file-first category analysis.
